name: UK driving licence renewal processing time
title: UK driving licence renewal processing time
why_people_ask_ai: Applicants ask AI how long licence renewal takes, whether online applications are faster, and what official status page to check.
why_ai_gets_wrong: Processing times vary by application channel, document checks, strikes, backlogs, and temporary service updates.
